====On hand====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Nemona
|pkmn=Pawmot
|tera=Fighting
|type1=Electric
|type2=Fighting
|stage1=Pawmo
|img=Nemona Pawmo.png
|cap=Nemona's Pawmo
|img2=Nemona Pawmot.png
|cap2=Nemona's Pawmot
|epnum=HZ010
|epname=Nemona and Brassius and...
|vajp=Kei Shindō
|vaen=Erica Schroeder
|desc={{p|Pawmot}} is Nemona's first known Pokémon and is usually seen [[Walking Pokémon|outside of its Poké Ball]]. It first appeared as a {{p|Pawmo}} in ''[[HZ010|Nemona and Brassius and...]]'', where it was seen battling a Trainer's {{p|Skiploom}}, which it defeated with {{m|Spark}}. During the encounter with [[Brassius]], Pawmo was frequently hit by the oil of his {{p|Dolliv}}.

In ''[[HZ046|Welcome to Naranja Academy!]]'', Pawmo was revealed to have [[Evolution|evolved]] into Pawmot.

In ''[[HZ048|Sparkle! The Glow of Fire and Art!]]'', Nemona used Pawmot in her battle against [[Roy]], where it battled against his {{TP|Roy|Fuecoco}}. After a tough battle, Pawmot emerged victorious, defeating Fuecoco with {{m|Double Shock}}.

In ''[[HZ061|Resonating Spirits in a Challenge to Ryme!]]'', Nemona had Pawmot save {{TP|Liko|Terapagos}} from falling from the sky. In the [[HZ062|following episode]], Pawmot was used by Nemona to help Roy and Fuecoco in a [[Hyper Training]] session.

In ''[[HZ101|Terastallization vs. Mega Evolution!]]'', Nemona partnered Pawmot and {{p|Ribombee}} for a [[Double Battle]] against Roy's Crocalor and {{shiny}} {{TP|Roy|Lucario}}. After Roy [[Mega Evolution|Mega Evolved]] Lucario, Nemona {{Tera}}stallized Pawmot into a pure {{type|Fighting}}, but it ended up being defeated, thus making Nemona lose by default.

In ''[[HZ115|Welcome to Blueberry Academy!]]'', Pawmot was used in another Double Battle, this time partnered with Nemona's {{p|Decidueye}} again battling against Lucario and Crocalor. Thanks to the training Nemona received at the [[Blueberry Academy]] and Nemona's strategy with Decidueye's {{m|Spirit Shackle}}, Pawmot managed to defeat Lucario, and then Pawmot, by Terastalizing and using a Focus Punch against Crocalor, was able to defeat it.

In ''[[HZ127|The Training Royale!]]'', Pawmot battled Roy's Lucario once again. After a tough fight, Pawmot Terastallized while Lucario Mega Evolve, with both Pokémon clashing attacks with each other. In the end, Pawmot won again after dodging Lucario's final attack at the last moment and used Mach Punch.

In ''[[HZ134|One Step Closer]]'', Pawmot was sent out to help the rest of the Tera Type Pokémon in purify Laquium for good. In the [[HZ135|next episode]], Pawmot and the rest of the Tera Type Pokémon made an attempt to purify the Laquium Core, but the Explorers interfered, losing [[Penny]]'s {{p|Sylveon}} in the process, until [[Coral]] sent out her {{p|Scream Tail}}, nicknamed Screamypuff, to take the {{pkmn|category|Intertwining Pokémon}}'s place. However, Pawmot and the rest of the Tera Type Pokémon couldn't erase the Laquium Core before Spinel merged with it, awakening it. Pawmot subsequently teamed up with its friends to take down the Laquium Core. It then helped its allies to weaken the Laquium Core, before joining its allies to purify the core in the [[HZ136|next episode]].

Pawmot's known moves are {{m|Spark}}, {{m|Quick Attack}}, {{m|Dig}}, {{m|Double Shock}}, {{m|Discharge}}, {{m|Mach Punch}}, and {{m|Focus Punch}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Nemona
|pkmn=Ribombee
|type1=Bug
|type2=Fairy
|img=Nemona Ribombee.png
|epnum=HZ101
|epname=Terastallization vs. Mega Evolution!
|vaen=
|desc={{p|Ribombee}} is Nemona's second known Pokémon. She partnered Ribombee and {{p|Pawmot}} for a [[Double Battle]] against [[Roy's Crocalor]] and {{shiny}} {{TP|Roy|Lucario}}. Throughout the battle, Ribombee acted as a support Pokémon, healing up and restoring Pawmot's stamina, as well as protecting their side of the field with different [[status move]]s. At the end, however, Pawmot ended up being defeated, thus making Nemona lose by default.

In ''[[HZ133|The Final Battle Is Near]]'', Ribombee was the second Pokémon Nemona used in her battle against [[Indi]] and [[Rubina]]'s {{p|Cofagrigus}} and {{p|Runerigus}}. It became affected by the opponent's Curse immediately, dealing damage to it while being unable to attack or switch out due to Destiny Bond and Mean Look. After Dot's Gholdengo sacrificed itself to defeat the Runerigus and Cofagrigus, Ribombee was able to be recalled and freed from Curse's effects.

Ribombee's known moves are {{m|Pollen Puff}}, {{m|Light Screen}}, {{m|Sticky Web}}, and {{m|Energy Ball}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Nemona
|pkmn=Decidueye
|stage1=Rowlet
|stage2=Dartrix
|type1=Grass
|type2=Ghost
|img=Nemona Decidueye.png
|cap=Nemona's Decidueye
|epnum=HZ115
|epname=Welcome to Blueberry Academy!
|vajp=
|vaen=
|desc={{p|Decidueye}} is Nemona's third known Pokémon, which she evolved from a {{p|Rowlet}} that she caught upon arriving in [[Blueberry Academy]]. Nemona used it in her [[Double Battle]] against [[Roy]] where it was able to trap Roy's {{shiny}} {{TP|Roy|Lucario}} with {{m|Spirit Shackle}}, allowing {{p|Pawmot}} to defeat it.

In ''[[HZ133|The Final Battle Is Near]]'', Decidueye was used to defeat one of [[Rubina]]'s {{p|Runerigus}}, but fainted due to the effects of {{m|Destiny Bond}}.

Decidueye's known moves are {{m|Phantom Force}}, {{m|Leaf Blade}}, {{m|Spirit Shackle}}, and {{m|Razor Leaf}}.}}
